briefdescription.para: Value representing how many bits in a byte.
Value representing the number of bytes in a word.
Value representing the number of words in bus width.

detaileddescription.para: MRAM register bus width is 128-bits, which means that 4 words can be written in one bus width.

briefdescription.para: Value representing resistive random access memory (MRAM) base address.
Default value for waiting for a next write.

simplesect.para: NRF_MRAMC_HAS_POWER_MASK Symbol indicating whether the POWER_MASK register is present.
NRF_MRAMC_HAS_CONFIGNVR_PAGE_UPPER_PROTECT Symbol indicating whether CONFIGNVR.PAGE[n] registers have upper part of NVR page read and write protection fields.
NRF_MRAMC_HAS_CONFIGNVR_PAGE_LOWER_PROTECT Symbol indicating whether CONFIGNVR.PAGE[n] registers have lower part of NVR page read and write protection fields.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure of configuration of the peripheral.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_MRAMC_Type *p_reg, uint32_t mask, uint8_t irq_priority, bool enable)
memberdef.name: nrfy_mramc_int_init

briefdescription.para: Function for initializing the specified MRAMC interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be initialized.
Interrupt priority.
True if interrupts associated with the event mask are to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for uninitializing the MRAMC interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for processing the specified MRAMC events.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of events to be processed, created by NRFY_EVENT_TO_INT_BITMASK().

simplesect.para: Mask of events that were generated and processed. To be checked against the result of NRFY_EVENT_TO_INT_BITMASK().

briefdescription.para: Function for writing a 32-bit word to MRAM.

simplesect.para: Depending on the source of the code being executed, the CPU may be halted during the operation. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Address to where data is to be written. Must be word-aligned.
Value to be written.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_MRAMC_Type *p_reg, uint32_t address, void const *src, uint32_t num_words)
memberdef.name: nrfy_mramc_words_write

briefdescription.para: Function for writing consecutive 32-bit words to MRAM.

detaileddescription.para: Function uses direct write mode to write to MRAM directly.

simplesect.para: Depending on the source of the code being executed, the CPU may be halted during the operation. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Address to where data is to be written. Must be word-aligned.
Pointer to data to be copied. Must be word-aligned.
Number of words to be written.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading a 32-bit word from the MRAM.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the word to be read.

simplesect.para: Value read from MRAM.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading a given number of bytes from the MRAM into the specified buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the buffer to store the data.
Address of the first byte to be read.
Number of bytes to be read.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading a word from the OTP in UICR.

detaileddescription.para: OTP is a region of the UICR present in some chips. This function must be used to read word data from this region since unaligned accesses are not available on the OTP MRAM area.

parameterdescription.para: Address (index) in OTP table from which a word is to be read.
contents at index.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting CONFIGNVR read and write permission.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True to enable write and erase permission of CONFIGNVR.PAGE[n], false to disable.
Page number [0...n].

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_event_clear Function for clearing the specified MRAMC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Event to clear.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_event_check Function for retrieving the state of the MRAMC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_event_address_get Function for getting the address of the specified MRAMC event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Requested event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.
nrf_mramc_int_enable Function for enabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_mramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_int_disable Function for disabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_mramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_int_enable_check Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_mramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: Mask of enabled interrupts.
nrf_mramc_int_pending_get Function for retrieving the state of pending interrupts.
States of pending interrupt are saved as a bitmask. One set at particular position means that interrupt for event is pending.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Bitmask with information about pending interrupts. Use nrf_mramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.
nrf_mramc_ready_get Function for checking current MRAMC operation status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Current operation is completed and MRAMC is ready.
MRAMC is busy.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_readynext_get Function for checking READYNEXT register status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
MRAMC is ready to accept a new write operation.
MRAMC cannot accept any write operation now.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_ecc_get Function for getting Error Correction Code (ECC) information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the data structure to be filled with ECC information.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_ecc_error_clear Function for clearing flag indicating detected error which could not be corrected.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_ecc_corr_clear Function for clearing flag indicating detected error which was corrected.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_config_set Function for setting the MRAMC peripheral configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure containing configuration to be set.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_config_get Function for getting the MRAMC peripheral configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with MRAMC configuration data.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_autoreadmode_set Function for setting the timeout value for automatic read mode.
The timeout value is number of MRAMC clock cycles. This feature is disabled when the value is 0. The CONFIG is updated on timeout. Timeout value must be in range: 0-4095.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Timeout value.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_autoreadmode_get Function for getting the timeout value for automatic read mode.
The timeout value is number of MRAMC clock cycles. This feature is disabled when the value is 0.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Timeout value.
nrf_mramc_waitstates_set Function for setting wait states for MRAM read access.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about waitstates for MRAM read access.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_waitstates_get Function for reading wait states for MRAM read access.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the data structure to be filled with waitstates information for MRAM read access.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_readynext_timeout_set Function for setting preload timeout value for waiting for a next write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about$ preload timeout value.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_readynext_timeout_get Function for reading preload timeout value for waiting for a next write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about preload timeout value.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_lowavgcurr_set Function for setting preload timeout value for low average current in case of read, write and erase.
The timeout value is number of MRAMC clock cycles, feature is disabled when the value is 0.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about preload timeout value for average current in case of read, write, and errase operation.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_lowavgcurr_get Function for getting preload timeout value for low average current in case of read, write and erase.
The timeout value is number of MRAMC clock cycles, feature is disabled when the value is 0.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about preload timeout value for average current in case of read, write, and errase operation.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_power_init_set Function for setting power-up/down sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power init mode.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_power_init_get Function for getting power-up/down sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Power init mode.
nrf_mramc_power_autopowerdown_set Function for setting automatic power-down feature using the inactive time period of MRAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about power-down feature configuration.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_power_autopowerdown_get Function for getting automatic power-down feature using the inactive time period of MRAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about power-down feature configuration.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_power_mask_set Function for setting mask for the various voltages supplies when initiating power-up/down.
All bits must be set to 0 for normal operation of MRAM. Incorrect usage would result in unknown behavior of MRAM.
Do not use this function unless you know the consequences.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about various voltages supplies when initiating power-up/down.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_power_mask_get Function for getting mask for the various voltages supplies when initiating power-up/down.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about various voltages supplies when initiating power-up/down.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_power_status_get Function for getting the power mode status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Status of the power mode.
nrf_mramc_powerup_ack_get Function for getting status of the power control signals acknowledgement during power-up sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about status of the power control signals acknowledgement during power-up sequence.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_powerdown_ack_get Function for getting status of the power control signals acknowledgement during power-down sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about status of the power control signals acknowledgement during power-down sequence.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_power_force_on_set Function for setting the configuration of force ON signal of the power supply.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about force ON power supply.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_power_force_on_get Function for getting force ON the power supply.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about force ON power supply.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_power_force_off_set Function for setting force OFF the power supply.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about force OFF power supply.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_power_force_off_get Function for getting force OFF the power supply.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about force OFF power supply.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_trim_datain_set Function for setting data to be written to the MRAM trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Data to be written to the MRAM trim configuration.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_trim_datain_get Function for getting data written to the MRAM trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Data written to the MRAM trim configuration.
nrf_mramc_trim_dataout_get Function for getting data read from the MRAM trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Data read from the MRAM trim configuration.
nrf_mramc_trim_count_set Function for setting number of bits in the current data to be written to and read from the trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Number of bits to be written.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_trim_count_get Function for getting number of bits in the current data to be written to and read from the trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Number of bits to be written.
nrf_mramc_trim_start Function for setting start shifting data for trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_trim_start_get Function for getting start shifting data for trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Start trim config.
No operation.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_trim_ready_get Function for getting status of shifting the MRAM trim configuration data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Ready for shifting the next MRAM trim configuration data.
Shifting the MRAM trim configuration data is in progress.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_trim_done_set Function for indicating to the MRAMC that the whole MRAM trim configuration data write is completed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_trim_done_get Function for getting trim configuration data status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Trim configuration status.
nrf_mramc_erase_word_set Function for erasing a 32-bit word in the MRAM main block.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Address of the word that needs to be erased in the MRAM.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_erase_area_set Function for erasing an area in the MRAM main block.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Start address of the area that needs to be erased in the MRAM.
Number of MRAM words to be erased.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_erase_area_get Function for getting address and size of the area to be erased in the MRAM main block.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the address of the area.
Pointer to the number of MRAM words to be erased.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_erase_all Function for erasing erasing whole MRAM main block and the first NVR page.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_erase_all_get Function for getting ERASE.ERASEALL register value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Start erase of chip.
No operation.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_erase_word_lock_set Function for setting the eraseword lock status.
When the lock is enabled, the write to the corresponding erase register is ignored, it remains enabled until the next reset cycle.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Set true to enable or false to disable a lock.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_erase_word_lock_get Function for getting the eraseword lock status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Lock enabled.
Lock disabled.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_erase_area_lock_set Function for setting the erasearea lock status.
When the lock is enabled, the write to the corresponding erase register is ignored, it remains enabled until the next reset cycle.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Set true to enable or false to disable a lock.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_erase_area_lock_get Function for getting the erasearea lock status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Lock enabled.
Lock disabled.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_erase_all_lock_set Function for setting the eraseall lock status.
When the lock is enabled, the write to the corresponding erase register is ignored, it remains enabled until the next reset cycle.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Set true to enable or false to disable a lock.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_erase_all_lock_get Function for getting the eraseall lock status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Lock enabled.
Lock disabled.

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_config_nvr_set Function for configuring the specified NVR page.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the settings data.
Page number [0...3].

simplesect.para: nrf_mramc_config_nvr_get Function for getting the configuring of the specified NVR page.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the settings data.
Page number [0...3].
